contentPattern.structure: small technology/platform icon above a short text label, arranged in a wrapping flex grid

suitableFor: technology/platform icon grids on portfolio detail pages
supported-device / supported-platform icon grids on product detail pages (e.g. Roku, FireTV, Apple TV, Android TV)
logo-with-label rows where each item is a small icon above a short caption
notSuitableFor: grids with large photos (use cards-departments or cards-products)
